name: Agricultural Supply
description: Items required for agricultural production. Includes fertilizers, feed, and pesticides.

name: Alloy
description: Substances that are compounds of two or more metals or other materials with improved properties over the base ingredients.

name: Consumer Goods
description: Commodities that are purchased by an individual to satisfy their wants or needs.

name: Drink
description: Liquids intended for consumption.

name: Food
description: Any substance that can be safely consumed by a living organism for the purpose of nutritional support.

name: Gas
description: A substance that when under standard pressure has vast distance between particles with weaker intermolecular bonds than other phases of matter.

name: HexaPolyMesh Coating
description: This liquid hexagonal lattice bonds readily to surfaces when electrically charged, solidifying almost instantaneously to create an incredibly strong and durable polymer mesh that maintains integrity at a range of temperatures and pressures.

name: Hydrogen Fuel
description: Hydrogen that is energized and then used by thrusters to propel vehicles.

name: Man-made
description: Commodities manufactured or constructed through industrial processes rather as opposed to being naturally occurring.

name: Medical Supply
description: A variety of items produced primarily to treat injury or illness.

name: Metal
description: A solid material that typically shiny and opaque and possesses good electrical and thermal conductivity.

name: Military Supply
description: A variety of items assembled to support combat forces, including ammunition, structural repair tools and clothing.

name: Mineral
description: Naturally occurring abiogenic compounds that are typically crystalline in nature with an ordered atomic arrangement.

name: Natural Materials
description: Materials that are naturally occurring and can be extracted directly from the environment.

name: Nonmetals
description: These elements do not display the properties of a metal and are generally poor conductors of heat and electricity.

name: Processed Goods
description: Items that are manufactured or assembled from a conglomeration of components.

name: Quantum Fuel
description: Fuel used by quantum drives to propel ships at high speeds or, if equipped with a jump module, through jump tunnels to other systems.

name: Recycled Material Composite
description: Recycled Material Composite, commonly referred to as RMC, is the end result of low-tier salvaging where a myriad of alloys and polymers are mixed together during the collection process.

name: Scrap
description: Waste that is ready to be converted into new materials for reuse.

name: Vice
description: Items that are regarded as immoral or harmful by society.

name: Waste
description: Unwanted and unusable materials that are designated to be discarded.
